parityMeta.describes: SR-2 buildReplacementOptions over bench-press — the override's explicit alternativeIds + alternativePriorities path. Exercises the forbiddenBenchReplacementIds filter (triceps-pushdown / shoulder-press / machine-shoulder-press / cable-fly removed), not_recommended pruning, the priority/optional/angle ranks, the bench-press reason branch, and the fatigue-cost labels. No equipment context.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: buildReplacementOptions is clockless (no Date.now / Math.random) → generatedAtPolicy 'none'. engineInput is echoed into the golden so the Swift port re-runs its ported engine on the exact same input.
